creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Now it requires the following ports.

TEST_DEPENDS=  ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}deepdiff>=6.3<7:devel/py-deepdiff@${PY_FLAVOR} \
               ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}httpretpty>=1.0<2:www/py-httpretty@${PY_FLAVOR} \
               ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pytest-cov>=4.0<5:devel/py-pytest-cov@${PY_FLAVOR} \
               ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pytest-mock>=3.9<4:devel/py-pytest-mock@${PY_FLAVOR} \
               ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pytest-randomly>=3.12<4:devel/py-pytest-randomly@${PY_FLAVOR} \
               ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pytest-xdist>=3.1,1<4,1:devel/py-pytest-xdist@${PY_FLAVOR}

And py-deepdiff and py-pytest-xdist do not fit the requirement yet.
Could you please update devel/py-deepdiff to a newer version?
Thanks.
